title: leucothoe ericoides
intro: Leucothoe ericoides, also known as the doghobble or swamp doghobble, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Leucothoe ericoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
